top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve issues initial findings from its 2025 triennial payments study

top_signals.title: Hamilton Lane Targets $220 Million for First China Yuan Fund
top_signals.summary: Hamilton Lane Inc., a private market investor that manages $1 trillion, is planning its first yuan-denominated fund to target discounted Chinese assets, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coast Guard Issues Notice on Unmanned Vessels
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard (USCG) identified multiple unmanned maritime system (UMS) operations occurring within and near major West Coast port approaches without prior coordination with cognizant Captains of the Port (COTP). The lack of advance notification…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Over 900 Oracle E-Business instances exposed to ongoing attacks
top_signals.summary: Over 900 Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) instances have been found exposed online amid ongoing attacks exploiting a critical security flaw. [...]
